zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Calthorpe於1558年8月31日出生在英國諾福爾可考可索普時，他的父親Christopher Calthorpe Esquire29歲，母親Joan Rokewood22歲。他於1577年8月31日與Barbara Bacon在英國素福爾可賀瑟特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年6月15日在英國諾福爾可斯塔斯東享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可考可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Calthorpe于1558年8月31日出生在英国諾福爾可考可索普时，他的父亲Christopher Calthorpe Esquire29岁，母亲Joan Rokewood22岁。他于1577年8月31日与Barbara Bacon在英国素福爾可賀瑟特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年6月15日在英国諾福爾可斯塔斯東享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可考可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Calthorpe was born on 31 August 1558, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Christopher Calthorpe Esquire, was 29 and his mother, Joan Rokewood, was 22. He married Barbara Bacon on 31 August 1577, in Hessett, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 June 1615, in Starston, Norfolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Calthorpe est né le 31 août 1558, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Calthorpe Esquire, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Rokewood, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Bacon le 31 août 1577, à Hessett, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1615, à Starston, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Calthorpe am 31. August 1558 in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Calthorpe Esquire 29 und seine Mutter Joan Rokewood 22. Er hat am 31. August 1577 in Hessett, Suffolk, England Barbara Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1615 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Starston, Norfolk, England und wurde in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Calthorpe è nato il il 31 agosto 1558 nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Christopher Calthorpe Esquire, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan Rokewood, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Bacon il 31 agosto 1577, nel Hessett, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1615, nel Starston, Norfolk, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Calthorpeが1558年8月31日にイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで生まれた時，父Christopher Calthorpe Esquireは29歳，母Joan Rokewoodは22歳であった。1577年8月31日にイギリススフォルクヘセットでBarbara Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年6月15日にイギリスノーフォルクスターストンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Calthorpe(이)가 1558년 8월 31일 영국 노르폴크 콕소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Calthorpe Esquire(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Rokewood(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1577년 8월 31일 영국 수폴크 헤싯에서 Barbara Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 6월 15일 영국 노르폴크 스타르스턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 콕소에 묻혔다.

pt.31 August 1558–15 June 1615: 31 de agosto de 1558–15 de junho de 1615
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Calthorpe nasceu em 31 de agosto de 1558, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Calthorpe Esquire, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rokewood, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Bacon em 31 de agosto de 1577, em Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1615, em Starston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Calthorpe родился 31 августа 1558 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Calthorpe Esquire было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Rokewood, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Bacon 31 августа 1577 г. в местности хессетт, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 июня 1615 г. в местности старстон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.31 August 1558–15 June 1615: 31 de agosto de 1558–15 de junio de 1615
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Calthorpe nació el 31 de agosto de 1558, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Calthorpe Esquire, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Rokewood, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Barbara Bacon el 31 de agosto de 1577, en Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1615, en Starston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
